content: We can reframe the original Self-Refine framework as a bootstrapping system that can be improved by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision. This new pipeline would let an LLM not only iteratively polish its output based on its own feedback, but also challenge its own assumptions by pulling in contradictory perspectives from alternate solving paths to avoid getting stuck in local optima of output quality.
